summary: Iteration 106 - Financial Results Section: All features tested and working correctly. Backend API tests passed (6/6). Frontend UI tests passed for all status cases including penalized (late), compensated, present (on_time), and waived participants.

backend_pytest: ✅ test_02_penalized_participant_has_correct_fields - Penalized participant has outcome, delay_minutes, capture_amount_cents, beneficiaries, guarantee_status, captured
✅ test_03_beneficiaries_structure - Beneficiaries array has correct structure (role, amount_cents) with valid roles (platform, organizer, affected, charity)
✅ test_04_compensation_received_cents_for_organizer - Organizer who received compensation has compensation_received_cents=2000, compensation_role='organizer'
✅ test_05_clean_results_appointment - Appointment with on_time and waived outcomes has correct financial_summary
✅ test_06_review_required_field - All entries have review_required boolean field
frontend_playwright: ✅ FinancialResultSection renders for appointment with penalties (23970d2e-985c-4eda-a1cd-953ca117d783)
✅ Section title 'Resultat financier' displayed with credit card icon
✅ 2 penalty amount displays (-25.00 € in red with 'penalite' label)
✅ 1 compensation amount display (+20.00 € in green with 'compensation' label)
✅ Status badge 'En retard (120 min)' displayed in red for late participants
✅ Dual status explanation: 'Compensation recue de 20.00 € (en tant qu'organisateur)'
✅ Distribution breakdown visible for organizer view ('Repartition de la penalite')
✅ FinancialResultSection renders for clean results appointment (12132ca1-2f84-4d26-8104-cf24df4ba21d)
✅ Status badge 'Present' displayed in green with checkmark icon
✅ Status badge 'Dispense' displayed in gray with checkmark icon

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ FinancialResultSection component (AppointmentDetail.js lines 213-365): Well-structured with proper status handling for all cases (late, no_show, on_time, waived, manual_review)
✅ Backend financial_summary builder (appointments.py lines 1466-1524): Correctly builds compensation_map from distributions and includes compensation_received_cents and compensation_role
✅ Status badges use appropriate colors: red for penalized (AlertTriangle icon), green for present (CheckCircle icon), gray for waived, amber for review
✅ Amounts displayed with correct formatting: penalty in red with dash prefix, compensation in green with plus prefix
✅ Distribution breakdown only shown for organizer view (isOrganizer prop check)
✅ Human-readable explanations are clear and comprehensive for all status cases
seed_data_creation: Used existing test appointments: 23970d2e-985c-4eda-a1cd-953ca117d783 (E2E Stripe Real Penalty with 2 penalized participants) and 12132ca1-2f84-4d26-8104-cf24df4ba21d (test invitation with on_time + waived)
context_for_next_testing_agent: FinancialResultSection is fully functional. The section displays for past appointments with attendance_evaluated=True. It shows each participant with: status badge (Absent/En retard/Present/Dispense/En cours de verification), penalty amount (red, dash prefix), compensation amount (green, plus prefix), human-readable explanation, and distribution breakdown (organizer view only). Backend correctly returns compensation_received_cents and compensation_role for participants who received compensation from other participants' penalties.

status_badges.late: En retard (X min) - red with AlertTriangle icon
status_badges.manual_review: En cours de verification - amber with Clock icon

human_readable_explanations.penalized_with_compensation: Penalise de X €. Compensation recue de Y € (en tant qu'organisateur)
human_readable_explanations.review: Decision en attente — aucune action financiere pour le moment

backend_financial_summary.compensation_map: Correctly aggregates compensation from distributions to user_id
